title: Chat
placeholder: Start the conversation by sending a message.
forkConfirmMessage: Create a new thread from this message and all previous messages?
regenerationConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to regenerate this message? The current content will be saved as a new slot.

directorDetailsModal.title: Director Details
directorDetailsModal.discardMessage: You have unsaved changes to the Director prompts. Are you sure you want to close without applying?

directorRegenerationResult.title: Director Regeneration
directorRegenerationResult.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel? The regenerated response will be discarded.

deleteAllConfirmMessage: This will delete every slot of this message bubble. This cannot be undone.
deleteFromHereConfirmMessage: This will delete this message and every message below it in the conversation. This cannot be undone.
responseTruncated: Response may have been cut off (max tokens reached)
noChatProfile: No Chat profile assigned. Please configure one in Settings > API before continuing.
noProfileModel: No Chat profile configured or model selected.
cancelConfirmMessage: The following active requests will be cancelled:
directorFailed: Director review failed — using original response.
cancelConfirmHint: If requests finish while this dialog is open, the confirm button will disable automatically.
cancelConfirmDoneHint: You can close this dialog — the requests completed on their own.
autoTitleCancelMessage: The auto-title request will be cancelled and the title will not be updated.
autoTitleCancelHint: If the request finishes while this dialog is open, the confirm button will disable automatically.
autoTitleCancelDone: The auto-title request has already completed.
autoTitleCancelDoneHint: You can close this dialog — the request finished on its own.
summaryCancelMessage: The summarization request will be cancelled and the conversation summary will not be updated.
summaryCancelHint: If the request finishes while this dialog is open, the confirm button will disable automatically.
summaryCancelDone: The summarization request has already completed.
summaryCancelDoneHint: You can close this dialog — the request finished on its own.

memoryRegeneration.title: Memory Entry Regeneration
memoryRegeneration.discardMessage: You have unsaved changes to the summarization prompt. Are you sure you want to close without regenerating?
memoryRegeneration.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel? The regenerated content will be discarded.

memoryDeleteConfirm: Delete this memory entry? This cannot be undone.
